name: Gamma Hi-Rise Ball Hopper
description: The Gamma Hi-Rise Ball Hopper holds up to 75 balls and doubles as a convenient ball dispenser during drills and practice sessions. The hi-rise design means no bending to pick up balls — just press the basket over a ball to scoop it. Folds flat for easy storage.

specifications.dimensions: 19 x 16 x 33 in (standing), folds to 4 in flat

care_instructions: Wipe with a dry cloth to prevent rust. Store indoors to protect the powder coating from weather damage. The rubber feet are replaceable if they wear down.
